channel.title: 2026-03-28 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-28 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: 扩散模型驱动的面向光电流应用铁电体发现
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Byung Chul Yeo, Hyun‐Jae Lee, Sungwoo Kang, Jung‐Hoon Lee
该工作将扩散模型用于铁电材料发现，目标是筛选适用于光电流相关应用的新型铁电体。题目表明研究结合了生成式人工智能与功能材料设计，关注材料发现效率与应用导向。由于仅提供刊发信息，具体模型构建、候选材料与实验验证细节需查阅原文。

item.title: Multi-objective AI-driven optimization guides the discovery of high-performance organic photovoltaics
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Feiyue Lu, Kang An, Qin Wang, Zhipeng Yin, Xinhui Liu, Jialin Wu 等14位作者
Experience-driven optimization has been pivotal in advancing organic photovoltaics, where chemically intuitive and stepwise tuning of processing parameters can yield high-performance organic solar cells (OSCs). However, systematically locating optimal regions under high-dimensional, strongly coupled, and multi-objective constraints remains challenging across diverse scenarios. Here, we introduce a closed-loop workflow base on multi-objective Bayesian optimization for efficient process optimization of OSCs. Applied to a quaternary system comprising the widely used polymer donors PM6 and D18 and the non-fullerene acceptors BTP-eC9 and L8BO, the workflow navigates an eight-dimensional space jointly defined by composition and fabrication variables, encompassing 2.2 × 1014 possible combination…

item.title: Information Content Analysis of Direct and Indirect Force Measurements for Machine Learning-Based Process State Classification in Multi-Stage Sheet Metal Forming
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Markus Schumann, Jonas Moske, Felix Divo, Antonia Wüst, Kristian Kersting, Peter Groche
The predictive power of machine learning models for process monitoring in sheet metal forming depends strongly on the information content of the sensor signals. This study investigates how force signal characteristics represent process conditions in a multi-stage forming process consisting of deep drawing and ironing, in which surface roughness evolves with a downstream tendency. Indirect and direct force measurement concepts are compared: While indirect sensors are prone to noise, direct sensors often show more clarity. Neural networks are trained on datasets covering multiple roughness and process configurations. Model performance is analysed using classification metrics and explainable AI methods. The results reveal a counterintuitive finding: Visually smooth force signals with high si…

item.title: 具有巨大剩余极化的外延钇掺杂氧化铪：用于铁电隧道结人工突触与类脑计算
item.description:
📚 ACS Nano: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Haoyan Meng, Xin Ren, Sijin Li, Jun Yang, Yankun Wang, Hong Wang, Boyu Wang, Jinyan Zhao, Jutta Schwarzkopf, Wei Ren, and Gang Niu
该研究聚焦外延钇掺杂氧化铪材料，并强调其具有较大的剩余极化特性。题目显示作者旨在将该材料用于铁电隧道结人工突触器件及类脑计算应用。由于提供的信息仅含题目与DOI，具体制备方法、器件性能和机理分析需查阅原文。

item.title: 缺陷己铵铅碘化物自组装量子阱中激子及激子复合体的磁响应
item.description:
📚 ACS Nano: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Maria F. Munoz, Destiny Konadu, Adedayo M. Sanni, Casandra L. Ward, Atish Ghosh, Amos Afugu, Zhen-Fei Liu, Angela R. Hight Walker, and Aaron S. Rury
该工作研究含缺陷的己铵铅碘化物自组装量子阱中激子及多体激子复合体在外磁场下的响应行为，重点关注能级分裂、束缚态稳定性与缺陷相关光谱效应。研究对于理解低维卤化物半导体中的多体激发与磁光调控具有参考价值，具体实验与计算细节需查阅原文。

item.title: 通过原子界面设计实现BiFeO3薄膜中可确定性调控的多态铁电翻转
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Ren‐Ci Peng, Shuzhen Yang, Xiaoxing Cheng, Mingqiang Li, Jinling Zhou, Caiyong Li, Peng Gao, Pu Yu, Ce‐Wen Nan
该工作研究BiFeO3薄膜中的多态铁电翻转行为，核心在于借助原子尺度界面设计实现确定性调控。题目表明该研究可能有助于提升铁电器件的状态可控性与功能拓展。由于摘要仅含期刊上线信息，具体材料结构、调控机制及性能数据需查阅原文。

item.title: 电磁成像揭示舒马金间隙浅部巨型逆冲断层蠕滑并非由充足流体所致
item.description:
📚 Nature Communications
👤 Yinchu Li, Samer Naif, Kerry Key, Steven Constable, Rob L. Evans, Donna J. Shillington 等8位作者
该研究利用可控源电磁成像对舒马金间隙进行探测，发现浅部巨型逆冲断层存在显著的电阻率非均一性。结果表明，断层带内流体体积有限、推断孔隙压力较低，难以单独解释其浅部蠕滑行为。作者据此提出，控制蠕滑的关键因素更可能是构造复杂性，而非仅仅流体超压。

item.title: Electron-phonon physics at the exascale: a hybrid MPI-GPU-OpenMP framework for scalable Wannier interpolation
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Tae Yun Kim, Zhe Liu, Sabyasachi Tiwari, Elena R. Margine, Feliciano Giustino
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 28 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02042-9 Electron-phonon physics at the exascale: a hybrid MPI-GPU-OpenMP framework for scalable Wannier interpolation

item.title: 具有多性质协同刺激响应的分子基磁-电材料
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yue Yang, Yu‐Xia Wang, Pei‐Pei Lu, Zhong‐Yi Liu, Yi‐Quan Zhang, Peng Cheng
该研究报道了一类分子基磁-电材料，强调其具备多种物性协同作用下的刺激响应行为。题目显示该材料可能在外场耦合调控和多功能响应方面具有潜在应用价值。由于摘要信息不足，具体组成、机制与性能仍需参考原文。

item.title: Prediction of ambient-pressure high-temperature superconductivity in electronically modified transition-metal hydrides
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Haowei Xu, Olivia Schneble, Rafael Jaramillo, Marek Polański, Ju Li
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 28 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02040-x Prediction of ambient-pressure high-temperature superconductivity in electronically modified transition-metal hydrides

item.title: [ASAP] Correction to “Excited-State Absorption: Reference Oscillator Strengths, Wave Function, and TDDFT Benchmarks”
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Jakub Širůček, Boris Le Guennic, Yann Damour, Pierre-François Loos, and Denis Jacquemin
Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.6c00505

item.title: An efficient two-step explicit/Crank-Nicolson with finite element approach for three-dimensional coupled Burgers' equations with source terms
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Eric Ngondiep
This paper constructs an efficient two-step explicit/Crank-Nicolson technique combined with finite element method to simulate a three-dimensional coupled Burgers equations with source terms, subject to appropriate initial and boundary conditions. The space derivatives are approximated using the finite element formulation whereas a combination of an efficient explicit scheme and crank-Nicolson approach is employed to interpolate the time derivative. The developed computational technique efficiently treats the time derivative term, ensuring its stability across small time steps. Both stability and convergence order of the new algorithm are numerically analyzed using the Lⁱⁿfty(0,T;L²)-norm. The computational results suggest that the proposed two-step explicit/Crank-Nicolson approach is temp…
